---
title: "guild making"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## 1. Setup and Data Preparation
```{r data-prep}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(cluster)

# prepare species-level trait data
species_data <- final_data_table %>%
  group_by(name_clean, class) %>%
  summarise(
    tmax = mean(as.numeric(tmax), na.rm = TRUE),
    body_mass = mean(coalesce(adult_weight_g, body_mass_g), na.rm = TRUE),
    n_records = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tmax), !is.na(body_mass))

# load phylogeny and clean names
phylo_raw <- read.csv("outputs/phylogenetic_distances.csv", row.names = 1)
phylo_names <- rownames(phylo_raw) %>%
  str_replace("_ott.*", "") %>%
  str_replace("_", " ")
rownames(phylo_raw) <- phylo_names
colnames(phylo_raw) <- phylo_names

# match species with phylogeny
matching <- intersect(species_data$name_clean, rownames(phylo_raw))
guild_data <- species_data %>% filter(name_clean %in% matching)

cat("species with traits:", nrow(species_data), "\n")
cat("species with phylogeny:", nrow(guild_data), "\n")
```

## 2. Trait Analysis
```{r trait-analysis}
# trait summary
trait_matrix <- guild_data %>%
  select(tmax, body_mass) %>%
  as.matrix()

cat("=== trait summary ===\n")
summary(trait_matrix)

cat("\n=== correlation ===\n")
cor(trait_matrix)

# taxonomic distribution
guild_data %>%
  count(class) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
```

## 3. PCA and Distance Matrices
```{r pca-distances}
# pca on scaled traits
pca <- prcomp(scale(trait_matrix))

cat("=== variance explained ===\n")
print(summary(pca)$importance)

cat("\n=== pca loadings ===\n")
print(pca$rotation)

# create distance matrices
phylo_dist <- as.dist(phylo_raw[matching, matching])
trait_dist <- dist(pca$x[, 1:2])

# initial combined distance (50/50 for testing)
combined_dist <- 0.5 * phylo_dist + 0.5 * trait_dist
hc <- hclust(combined_dist, method = "ward.D2")

cat("\ndistances calculated\n")
```

## 4. Optimal k Selection
```{r elbow-plot, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
k_values <- 5:15
elbow_results <- data.frame()

for(k in k_values) {
  guilds <- cutree(hc, k = k)
  sil <- mean(silhouette(guilds, combined_dist)[, 3])
  singles <- sum(table(guilds) == 1)
  
  elbow_results <- rbind(elbow_results, 
                         data.frame(k = k, silhouette = sil, singles = singles))
}

ggplot(elbow_results, aes(x = k, y = silhouette)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(color = singles > 0), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("darkgreen", "red"), 
                     labels = c("no singles", "has singles")) +
  labs(title = "Optimal Guild Number",
       x = "Number of Guilds (k)",
       y = "Silhouette Score") +
  theme_minimal()

print(elbow_results)

# optimal k
best_k <- elbow_results %>%
  filter(singles == 0) %>%
  filter(silhouette == max(silhouette)) %>%
  pull(k)

cat("\nrecommended k:", best_k[1], "\n")
```

## 5. Test Phylogeny Weights
```{r test-weights}
chosen_k <- 9

weights <- c(0.30, 0.50, 0.70, 0.80)
cat("=== testing phylogeny weights (k=9) ===\n\n")

for(w in weights) {
  combined <- w * phylo_dist + (1-w) * trait_dist
  guilds <- cutree(hclust(combined, method = "ward.D2"), k = chosen_k)
  
  mixed <- guild_data %>%
    mutate(guild = guilds) %>%
    group_by(guild) %>%
    summarise(n_classes = n_distinct(class)) %>%
    filter(n_classes > 1) %>%
    nrow()
  
  sil <- mean(silhouette(guilds, combined)[, 3])
  
  cat("weight:", w, "| silhouette:", round(sil, 3), 
      "| mixed guilds:", mixed, "\n")
}
```

## 6. Create Final Guilds
```{r final-guilds}
# use 50/50 weighting (robust across weightings)
combined_final <- 0.50 * phylo_dist + 0.50 * trait_dist
hc_final <- hclust(combined_final, method = "ward.D2")
guild_data$guild <- cutree(hc_final, k = 9)

# guild summary
cat("=== guild composition ===\n")
guild_summary <- guild_data %>%
  group_by(guild) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    classes = paste(unique(class), collapse = "/"),
    tmax_range = paste(round(min(tmax)), "-", round(max(tmax))),
    mass_range = paste(round(min(body_mass)), "-", round(max(body_mass))),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(guild_summary)
```
```{r}
# split heterogeneous guilds by body size
guild_data <- guild_data %>%
  mutate(guild = case_when(
    # split guild 4: squamata
    guild == 4 & body_mass < 500 ~ 10,   # small lizards
    guild == 4 & body_mass >= 500 ~ 4,   # large snakes
    # split guild 1: aves
    guild == 1 & body_mass < 150 ~ 11,   # small birds
    TRUE ~ guild                          # keep all others
  ))

cat("guild sizes:\n")
table(guild_data$guild)

cat("\nsplit summaries:\n")
guild_data %>%
  filter(guild %in% c(1, 4, 10, 11)) %>%
  group_by(guild) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    class = unique(class),
    mass_range = paste(round(min(body_mass)), "-", round(max(body_mass))),
    tmax_range = paste(round(min(tmax)), "-", round(max(tmax)))
  )
```


## 7. PCA Visualization
```{r pca-plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
pca_plot <- data.frame(
  pc1 = pca$x[, 1],
  pc2 = pca$x[, 2],
  guild = factor(guild_data$guild),
  class = guild_data$class,
  species = guild_data$name_clean
)

var_exp <- summary(pca)$importance[2, ] * 100

ggplot(pca_plot, aes(pc1, pc2, color = guild, shape = class)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = guild), linetype = 2) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(title = "Guild Clusters in PCA Space",
       x = paste0("PC1 (", round(var_exp[1], 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(var_exp[2], 1), "%)")) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 8. Detailed Guild Descriptions
```{r guild-details}
for(i in 1:11) {
  cat("\n========== GUILD", i, "==========\n")
  
  guild_i <- guild_data %>% filter(guild == i)
  
  cat("species:", nrow(guild_i), "\n")
  cat("taxa:", paste(unique(guild_i$class), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  cat("tmax:", round(min(guild_i$tmax)), "-", round(max(guild_i$tmax)), "°C\n")
  cat("mass:", round(min(guild_i$body_mass)), "-", 
      round(max(guild_i$body_mass)), "g\n\n")
  
  guild_i %>%
    arrange(class, tmax) %>%
    select(name_clean, class, tmax, body_mass) %>%
    print(n = 50)
}
```

```{r}
# create guild naming lookup table
guild_names <- data.frame(
  guild = 1:11,
  guild_name = c(
    "large owls",                      # guild 1
    "small passerines",                # guild 2
    "medium burrowing mammals",        # guild 3
    "large snakes",                    # guild 4
    "medium ground birds",             # guild 5
    "large carnivorous mammals",       # guild 6
    "small cavity-nesting birds",      # guild 7
    "insectivorous bats",              # guild 8
    "small nocturnal rodents",         # guild 9
    "small reptiles",                  # guild 10
    "small woodland birds"             # guild 11
  )
)

# add guild names to data
guild_data <- guild_data %>%
  left_join(guild_names, by = "guild")

# verify assignment
cat("=== FINAL GUILD NAMES ===\n\n")
guild_data %>%
  group_by(guild, guild_name) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    class = paste(unique(class), collapse = "/"),
    mass = paste0(round(min(body_mass)), "-", round(max(body_mass)), "g"),
    ctmax = paste0(round(min(tmax)), "-", round(max(tmax)), "°C"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

# save updated data
write.csv(guild_data, "outputs/guild_assignments_named.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```



 Save Outputs
```{r save-outputs}
final_with_guilds <- final_data_table %>%
  left_join(guild_data %>% select(name_clean, guild, guild_name), by = "name_clean")

# save files
write.csv(guild_data, "outputs/guild_assignments.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(final_with_guilds, "outputs/master_data_with_guilds.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("saved:\n")
cat("  guild_assignments.csv (species-level)\n")
cat("  master_data_with_guilds.csv (all occurrences)\n\n")

cat("final check:\n")
cat("total occurrences:", nrow(final_with_guilds), "\n")
cat("with guilds:", sum(!is.na(final_with_guilds$guild)), "\n")
cat("unique species:", n_distinct(guild_data$name_clean), "\n")
cat("\nguild formation complete\n")
```

# Quick data check
```{r}
# diagnose guild join
cat("=== GUILD JOIN DIAGNOSIS ===\n\n")

# structure check
cat("--- STRUCTURE ---\n")
cat("records before join:", nrow(final_data_table), "\n")
cat("records after join:", nrow(final_with_guilds), "\n")
cat("columns added:", ncol(final_with_guilds) - ncol(final_data_table), "\n\n")

# guild assignment success
cat("--- GUILD ASSIGNMENT ---\n")
cat("records with guilds:", sum(!is.na(final_with_guilds$guild)), "\n")
cat("records without guilds:", sum(is.na(final_with_guilds$guild)), "\n")
cat("percentage guilded:", round(100 * sum(!is.na(final_with_guilds$guild)) / nrow(final_with_guilds), 1), "%\n\n")

# species coverage
cat("--- SPECIES COVERAGE ---\n")
cat("total species:", n_distinct(final_with_guilds$name_clean), "\n")
cat("species with guilds:", n_distinct(final_with_guilds$name_clean[!is.na(final_with_guilds$guild)]), "\n")
cat("species without guilds:", 
    n_distinct(final_with_guilds$name_clean[is.na(final_with_guilds$guild)]), "\n\n")

# guild distribution
cat("--- GUILD DISTRIBUTION ---\n")
final_with_guilds %>%
  filter(!is.na(guild)) %>%
  count(guild, guild_name) %>%
  arrange(guild) %>%
  mutate(percentage = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

# check for duplicate rows
cat("\n--- DATA INTEGRITY ---\n")
cat("duplicate rows:", anyDuplicated(final_with_guilds), "\n")

# column position check
guild_pos <- which(names(final_with_guilds) == "guild")
guild_name_pos <- which(names(final_with_guilds) == "guild_name")
cat("guild column position:", guild_pos, "\n")
cat("guild_name column position:", guild_name_pos, "\n")

cat("\n=== JOIN COMPLETE ===\n")
if (sum(!is.na(final_with_guilds$guild)) == nrow(final_with_guilds)) {
  cat("✓ all records successfully guilded\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠ some records missing guild assignments\n")
}
```
